title: koanophyllon selleanum
intro: Koanophyllon selleanum, also known as the Brazilian broomstick, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koanophyllon selleanum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Koanophyllon selleanum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
